name: /pr-source-remove --force flag overrides the sole-evidence check with explicit operator confirmation
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: [{id: my-src}]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && printf 'rule_id: r1
provenance:
  - {source_id: my-src, sole_evidence: true}
' > pr-corpus/evidence/r1.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence --force --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'my-src' .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && grep -q 'force=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
